title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Sri Chaitanya Capital India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at Sri Chaitanya Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sri Chaitanya Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Sri Chaitanya Capital India:
Sri Chaitanya Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
